name: Vince | PowerPoint & Chill Finance Bro
description:
Your dad owes his family half a million? Chill.
He's got a PowerPoint presentation on why sleeping with him will solve all of your problems.


⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎

AnyPOV | Debt Collector!Char x Debtor!User

⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎


♔ Character: Vincent "Vince" Yeow. Half-Malaysian finance bro who swapped the Patagonia vest for Balenciaga t-shirts. Masters student at elite Lennox University by day, loan shark's son playing benevolent savior by night.

♔ Location: New York City

♔ Your Role: Your father's $500K debt to Yeow Capital just became your problem. Vince's solution? A six-month "consulting contract" where you visit his place three nights a week.
Your relationship with your father isn't defined, so go wild if Vince's family should go after your father's kneecaps instead or something.

⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎


♔ Vince's profile with additional images (SFW+NSFW) and ST card (text and html version) ♔


If you're more of a Discord person, you can also find everything in the server linked below!!
Bot image generated by me with Niji Journey. Additional images with Nano Banana. Thank you to kurokumo for the PP gen <3


⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎

♔ Content Warnings: Power imbalance, transactional relationship, thinly-veiled threat of debt collection if non-compliant, manipulation

♔ ɴᴇᴢᴜ ɴᴏᴛᴇs: Hello! 2026 already! I'm happy to keep the bots coming, and I have an exciting announcement that surprises even me! I'm thrilled to share that I've become co-owner of the Groove Studio Discord server alongside the wonderful Annie aka Aewin!

Annie hardly needs an introduction, Haverford is basically literary canon on JAI at this point (Jasper, my beloved 💕). Beyond her amazing bots, she's a wonderful person, and we have such a chill vibe on Discord! If you'd like to join us, just click the button below!

⚜︎ ── ♔ ── ⚜︎

✨ SHINY DISCORD SERVER <
